title: Police 'soup up' for Mandela Day
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Passers-by and visitors to the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Passers-by and visitors to the Knysna Police Station were treated to a cup of hot soup and bread on Friday 18 July, in celebration of Mandela Day. The event formed part of a collaborative initiative between the Knysna Community Police Forum (CPF) and the Department of Correctional Services (DCS).","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Passers-by and visitors to the Knysna Police Station were treated to a cup of hot soup and bread on Friday 18 July, in celebration of Mandela Day. The event formed part of a collaborative initiative between the Knysna Community Police Forum (CPF) and the Department of Correctional Services (DCS)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The partners came together to serve the community with a hearty soup, one kind cup at a time,\" said Cheryl Britz, CPF chairperson.","html":"\"The partners came together to serve the community with a hearty soup, one kind cup at a time,\" said Cheryl Britz, CPF chairperson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"With Madiba’s words in mind - ‘It always seems impossible until it’s done’ - we aimed to show the power of unity and compassion.\"","html":"\"With Madiba’s words in mind - ‘It always seems impossible until it’s done’ - we aimed to show the power of unity and compassion.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Britz emphasised that both the South African Police Service (SAPS) and the DCS remain committed to promoting peace, inspiring belief in what is possible, and encouraging ongoing acts of kindness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We urge everyone to keep paying it forward - every day, with kindness and a smile.\"","html":"\"We urge everyone to keep paying it forward - every day, with kindness and a smile.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She also commended the dedicated officials who responded to the call to action, helping to honour and carry forward Nelson Mandela’s legacy.","html":"She also commended the dedicated officials who responded to the call to action, helping to honour and carry forward Nelson Mandela’s legacy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
